name: claude-notebook
description: Agent notebook for the JD vault. `/notebook` saves the current session as a per-session note in `03.13 Agent notebook/YYYY-MM/` (one file per session, metadata in YAML frontmatter, body is headline + free-form prose). `/notebook-rollup` generates weekly narrative rollups (`rollups/Agent rollup for YYYY-WNN.md`) for completed ISO weeks that have sessions but no rollup yet.
